subcodes.first_line: O Mihdi! Upon thee be My glory! Although thou art not outwardly present before the Wronged One, yet in a realm sanctified from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا مهدی علیک بهائی اگرچه در ظاهر لدی المظلوم حاضر نه ولکن در عالمیکه مقدس از
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
